title: SpawnerTouch
description: Silk Touch Spawners And TrialSpawners Summon command and give command for Custom Spawner and TrialSpawner
body:
Silk touch spawners and trialspawners with economy support
Highly configureable silk touching spawners and trialspawners with configureable costs thru balance or commands adding summon command for multiple monsters and animals at the same time and a give command for spawners by mob / animal type
